channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Low-dose pill reduces stroke recurrence after brain hemorrhage
item.description: A combination pill with three low-dose antihypertensive agents may reduce recurrent stroke in patients recovering from intracerebral hemorrhage.

item.title: Molecular test accurately detects pulmonary tuberculosis
item.description: A new molecular test using sputum and tongue swabs shows diagnostic accuracy in patients with suspected pulmonary tuberculosis.

item.title: Signs of Kidney Stones You Shouldn’t Ignore
Pharma Roundup: Geopolitical, Cancer, Glomerulosclerosis & Weight Loss Updates
item.description: Escalating tensions in the Strait of Hormuz pose a risk to generic drug supplies. New developments also include cancer treatment, kidney disease therapy and weight loss options.
